description_long: This is an open hardcover book resting on a flat surface, with its pages spread wide to reveal both text and a colorful diagram. The book's pages are slightly curved, suggesting a well-used or thick volume. The left page contains dense text, while the right page features a scientific or educational diagram with several colored circles connected by lines, possibly illustrating a process or system. The cover appears to be a medium brown, resembling wood or leather, and the pages are a light cream color. The book's thickness and the visible layering of pages indicate it is a substantial volume, likely used for study or reference. The overall appearance is clean and professional, suitable for use in an urban educational or public setting.
description: An open hardcover book with cream pages, dense text, and a colorful scientific diagram, set on a brown cover. The book appears thick and well-made, ideal for study or reference.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with both pages visible, highlighting the diagram on the right and text on the left.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thickness of the book and the layering of the pages, with minimal detail of the content.
description_view_2: Rear view of the open book, with the diagram now on the left and text on the right, emphasizing the book's spread.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the diagram page, with the book's thickness and page curvature visible.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a scientific-style diagram with several colored circles connected by lines, suggesting a conceptual or educational theme. The illustration is clean and schematic, with a focus on clarity and information.
